title: coix stenocarpa
intro: Coix stenocarpa, also known as Chinese pearl barley or Job's tears, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Coix stenocarpa is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or decoction, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
